overview.about: Charyn Canyon is one of KZ's most celebrated natural wonder destinations, located in Almaty, KZ. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Biodiversity Hotspot
highlights.desc: Home to rare and endemic species — flora and fauna found nowhere else on the planet within pristine ecosystems

highlights.label: World-Renowned Trekking
highlights.desc: Trails from leisurely nature walks to multi-day high-altitude expeditions with breathtaking panoramic rewards

highlights.label: Wildlife Encounters
highlights.desc: Spot iconic wildlife in their natural habitat — guided walks dramatically increase sighting rates of rare species

highlights.label: Dramatic Natural Landscapes
highlights.desc: Awe-inspiring vistas of mountains, gorges, waterfalls and geological formations sculpted over millions of years

overview.about: Medeu Rink is one of KZ's most celebrated mountain destination destinations, located in Almaty, KZ. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Awe-Inspiring Peaks
highlights.desc: Stand beneath peaks that pierce the clouds — some of the highest, most dramatic mountain ranges on the planet

highlights.label: World-Class Trekking Routes
highlights.desc: Legendary trails traversing alpine meadows, glacial passes and ancient shepherd paths used for centuries

highlights.label: Snow Adventures
highlights.desc: Skiing, snowboarding and ice-trekking on slopes that remain covered well into spring and summer months

highlights.label: Sunrise Panoramas
highlights.desc: Golden hour from high-altitude viewpoints paints surrounding valleys in colours no photograph fully captures

overview.about: Baikonur Cosmodrome is one of KZ's most celebrated heritage landmark destinations, located in Baikonur, KZ. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Centuries of Living History
highlights.desc: Structures standing for hundreds to thousands of years — each stone a silent chronicle of empires and civilisations

highlights.label: UNESCO World Heritage Site
highlights.desc: Recognised globally for outstanding universal value and protected as one of Earth's most significant cultural landmarks

highlights.label: Iconic Photography Spot
highlights.desc: Panoramic vistas, intricate carvings and sunrise silhouettes that appear on bucket lists worldwide — every angle tells a story

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today

highlights.desc: Structures standing for hundreds to thousands of years — each stone a silent chronicle of empires and civilisations

highlights.label: UNESCO World Heritage Site
highlights.desc: Recognised globally for outstanding universal value and protected as one of Earth's most significant cultural landmarks

highlights.label: Iconic Photography Spot
highlights.desc: Panoramic vistas, intricate carvings and sunrise silhouettes that appear on bucket lists worldwide — every angle tells a story

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today

overview.about: Scenic Baikonur Summit is one of KZ's most celebrated mountain destination destinations, located in Baikonur, KZ. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Awe-Inspiring Peaks
highlights.desc: Stand beneath peaks that pierce the clouds — some of the highest, most dramatic mountain ranges on the planet

highlights.label: World-Class Trekking Routes
highlights.desc: Legendary trails traversing alpine meadows, glacial passes and ancient shepherd paths used for centuries

highlights.label: Snow Adventures
highlights.desc: Skiing, snowboarding and ice-trekking on slopes that remain covered well into spring and summer months

highlights.label: Sunrise Panoramas
highlights.desc: Golden hour from high-altitude viewpoints paints surrounding valleys in colours no photograph fully captures

overview.about: New Shymkent Cathedral is one of KZ's most celebrated heritage landmark destinations, located in Shymkent, KZ. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Centuries of Living History
highlights.desc: Structures standing for hundreds to thousands of years — each stone a silent chronicle of empires and civilisations

highlights.label: UNESCO World Heritage Site
highlights.desc: Recognised globally for outstanding universal value and protected as one of Earth's most significant cultural landmarks

highlights.label: Iconic Photography Spot
highlights.desc: Panoramic vistas, intricate carvings and sunrise silhouettes that appear on bucket lists worldwide — every angle tells a story

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today

overview.about: Royal Almaty Palace is one of KZ's most celebrated heritage landmark destinations, located in Almaty, KZ. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

overview.about: Grand Shymkent Hot Springs is one of KZ's most celebrated natural wonder destinations, located in Shymkent, KZ. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Biodiversity Hotspot
highlights.desc: Home to rare and endemic species — flora and fauna found nowhere else on the planet within pristine ecosystems

highlights.label: World-Renowned Trekking
highlights.desc: Trails from leisurely nature walks to multi-day high-altitude expeditions with breathtaking panoramic rewards

highlights.label: Wildlife Encounters
highlights.desc: Spot iconic wildlife in their natural habitat — guided walks dramatically increase sighting rates of rare species

highlights.label: Dramatic Natural Landscapes
highlights.desc: Awe-inspiring vistas of mountains, gorges, waterfalls and geological formations sculpted over millions of years

overview.about: New Almaty Peak is one of KZ's most celebrated mountain destination destinations, located in Almaty, KZ. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Awe-Inspiring Peaks
highlights.desc: Stand beneath peaks that pierce the clouds — some of the highest, most dramatic mountain ranges on the planet

highlights.label: World-Class Trekking Routes
highlights.desc: Legendary trails traversing alpine meadows, glacial passes and ancient shepherd paths used for centuries

highlights.label: Snow Adventures
highlights.desc: Skiing, snowboarding and ice-trekking on slopes that remain covered well into spring and summer months
